overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, walking through a neon-lit covered market alleyway at night. The player character moves past futuristic motorcycles, clothing stalls, and digital billboards in a dense cyberpunk setting with dominant teal and red neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor beneath parked vehicles

events.description: begins moving forward from a crouched position under a futuristic motorcycle

agents.ego_description: crouching under and moving past a large futuristic motorcycle to enter a narrow metal corridor

entered.detail: red and black cyberpunk motorcycle with glowing blue accents that the player starts underneath
rusted metal grate flooring with visible gaps and orange lighting underneath
traditional Asian-style red lanterns hanging from the ceiling
cyan-colored fluorescent tube lights illuminating the corridor ahead

segments.scene_description: The clip opens with a first-person view crouched beneath a futuristic motorcycle in a tight, dark corridor. The player moves forward under the vehicle, revealing a narrow walkway with metal grating floors and red paper lanterns hanging overhead, lit by distant cyan neon lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market walkway with clothing vendor stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow corridor passing clothing stalls and hanging garments on the left side

entered.detail: wooden stall with folded clothes and hanging jackets on display
weathered concrete column with metal railings attached
clothes and fabric hanging from lines above the stall

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper into the covered alleyway, the player walks along metal grating floors past a clothing vendor stall on the left. The corridor remains narrow with concrete pillars on the right and red lanterns continuing overhead, maintaining the enclosed market atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: market intersection with large digital billboard and vending area

events.description: floor surface changes from metal grating to concrete tiles as space widens slightly
encounter an NPC standing near a large illuminated billboard

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing a large digital billboard with an NPC standing nearby, observing the surroundings

notable_agents.action: tattooed man with pink gloves and red hair standing near the billboard, looking around the market

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement displaying text about the 2nd amendment with images of armed figures
red and yellow automated vending machine against the wall
bright green plastic stool near a small table on the right side

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a slightly wider area with concrete flooring where a large digital billboard dominates the left wall. An NPC with distinctive tattoos and pink gloves stands near the billboard as the player passes by, with a vending machine visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: wider market alley with parked vehicles and scattered debris

events.description: space opens into a wider alley with parked motorcycles and scattered trash

agents.ego_description: navigating through the wider alleyway around scattered debris and parked vehicles, heading toward the open end

entered.detail: row of parked motorcycles and scooters along the left wall
stacked cardboard boxes and crates on the right side of the walkway
scattered trash and discarded items across the concrete floor
tall digital display showing advertisements visible at the end of the alley
staircase leading upward on the left side with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The final section opens into a wider alley with concrete flooring, scattered debris, and parked motorcycles lining the left wall. The player walks toward a more open area with a large digital screen visible in the distance and a staircase leading upward, while navigating around litter and cardboard boxes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a cramped, dark underbelly of a market into a wider, debris-strewn urban alleyway. It begins crouched beneath a futuristic motorcycle in a tight corridor, moving forward across metal grating floors beneath a canopy of red paper lanterns and distant cyan neon lights. As the camera advances deeper into the covered walkway, it passes a clothing vendor stall and concrete pillars before the space opens into a wider concrete area. The scene then shifts past a large digital billboard and a tattooed NPC with pink gloves, moving toward a vending machine in the background. Finally, the path expands into a broad alley lined with parked motorcycles and scattered litter, heading toward a distant digital screen and a staircase leading upward.
